hero.eyebrow: Built for the caregiver in the middle
hero.title: Walk into the next appointment ready — in one tap.
hero.subtitle: Snap any lab report or prescription. KinMate's AI extracts the medication, dose, date and doctor in seconds, then files it under the right person. No typing. No drawer of paper. No scrolling your camera roll while the doctor waits. Just one tap — mom's current meds, dad's recent labs, your kid's vaccine record — ready on the appointment screen.
hero.promise: Stays on your device. There the moment the doctor asks.
hero.privacyFinePrint: 🔒 Local-first storage · End-to-end encrypted · Zero analytics SDKs · We never see your files

trust.title: Why caregivers trust KinMate with the most private data their family owns

items.title: Local-first by default
items.body: PDFs, images, and AI summaries live in your device's secure storage. We never see your files.

items.title: Bring your own cloud
items.body: Back up to your own iCloud Drive, Google Drive, or OneDrive. Encrypted with a key only you hold.

items.title: Bilingual AI
items.body: Explain a report in English or Chinese, either way. Ideal for families living across languages and borders.

items.title: One flexible pool, not rigid seats
items.body: Every paid plan includes 2 managed seats. Family plans add a flexible pool you can use for real family members or extra managed profiles. Pets are separate — even Free includes one.

features.title: Built for the caregiver doing the caring
features.subtitle: Less typing. Less hunting. Less mental load — for the daughter, son, partner managing it all.

items.title: Capture in seconds
items.body: Snap a photo, pick from your library, or import a PDF — KinMate files it by person, date and report type.

items.title: Metrics that show the trend
items.body: Log blood pressure, glucose, lipids, liver & kidney values — charted over 7/30/90 days with normal-range markers.

items.title: Medications & smart reminders
items.body: Track prescriptions and get gentle local reminders for doses, follow-ups, vaccines and vet visits — never spam.

items.title: Family, dependents & pets
items.body: One vault for the whole household — members you care for and pets, each with their own private records.

items.title: Bilingual AI explanations
items.body: Turn a dense lab report into plain English or Chinese. Disclaimers built in — it informs, it never diagnoses.

items.title: Patient summary for clinic visits
items.body: One-tap structured summary: basic info, disease history, current medications, allergies and recent abnormal indicators. Translate to English to share with your clinician.

items.title: Multi-metric trend analysis
items.body: Track blood pressure, glucose, cholesterol and more across 30/90/180 days. Abnormalities are flagged, severity scored, with a plain-language read.

items.title: Medical case management
items.body: AI extracts diagnoses and prescriptions from your reports into structured cases. Track active vs resolved, link reports, edit by hand.

items.title: Emergency medical card
items.body: Critical info card — blood type, allergies, chronic conditions, current medications, contacts. Show the QR code in a crisis.

items.title: Genetic risk from family history
items.body: Aggregate family diagnoses into risk profiles for common hereditary conditions. AI-generated, plain language, with prevention suggestions.

items.title: Unified health timeline
items.body: Reports, diagnoses, medications and key events on one chronological timeline per profile. Filter by type, jump to any year.

items.title: Family health dashboard
items.body: Overview card for every member: active cases, attention metrics, overall status. Surfaces who needs attention first.

items.title: Care check-in for distant family
items.body: Aging parents tap once a day to say they're okay; miss it and you get an alert. Caring, not surveillance.

items.title: Your cloud, your export
items.body: Back up to iCloud, Google Drive or OneDrive. Export the entire vault anytime as an encrypted archive.

items.title: True cross-device sync
items.body: Sign in on a new phone and reports, cases, metrics, medications and emergency cards rehydrate automatically. Pull-to-refresh pulls the same complete set.

pricing.title: Simple pricing for families who want clarity.
pricing.subtitle: Start with a 60-day full-feature trial for the first 1,000 users. Family 8 is a lifetime founder offer at $199.99, 50% off the regular $399.99.
pricing.freeTrialBadge: Launch special: first 1,000 users get 60 days free

launchPromo.title: KinMate is officially live
launchPromo.body: Thank you to our earliest users. To celebrate our App Store launch, we are giving the first 1,000 users a 60-day free trial and opening a limited-time lifetime membership offer. iOS subscriptions are live now; Android subscriptions will open after the Google Play release.
launchPromo.footer: One-time purchase. Lifetime access. Future core updates included. First come, first served.

free.name: Free
features: Up to 3 local reports (upgrade for unlimited)

family3.name: Family 3
features: Up to 3 family members (2 base + flexible pool of 3)

plans.bigFamilies: Need more than 8? Family 10 and Family 12 are available for larger multigenerational households — get in touch.

byoc.title: Bring your own cloud backup
byoc.subtitle: Your files. Your cloud. Your encryption key.
byoc.body: Most apps store your data on their servers. KinMate stores it on yours. Enable cloud backup once, and KinMate encrypts your vault locally with AES-256-GCM before uploading. The key never leaves your device.

providers.name: Google Drive
providers.scope: OAuth scope drive.file only — we can't see your other files

providers.name: OneDrive
providers.scope: Microsoft Graph AppFolder — KinMate folder only

byoc.warning: Your 12-word recovery phrase is shown once. Write it down or save to your system password manager. If you lose it, even KinMate cannot decrypt your backup.

referral.title: Invite & earn
referral.subtitle: The more friends who actually use KinMate, the more free Pro days you get. Each tier is one-time; cumulative cap is 365 days per account.
referral.validInvite: What counts as a valid invite
validInviteItems: Uses the app for more than 2 days
Unique device, not flagged by anti-abuse
settlementItems: Lifetime cumulative valid invites determine which tier you qualify for
Each tier can be claimed once
Per-account cumulative cap: 365 days of Pro
We review and grant rewards every 3 days; flagged accounts go through manual review

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.summary: Short version: KinMate is a personal record manager. Your documents stay on your device by default. We never read them.

sections.p: KinMate is a Personal Record Manager and Family Information Organizer. It helps you and your family keep health documents, care reminders, and personal records organized in one private place. KinMate is NOT a medical service, telehealth platform, diagnostic tool, treatment provider, or insurance product. It does not perform medical monitoring of any kind.

sections.h: What stays on your device only
sections.p: Health documents (PDFs and images), text extracted from them, AI-generated explanations, and personal records you enter (such as care reminders, medication names, or condition labels) are stored locally in your device's secure storage. None of this content is uploaded to KinMate's servers.

sections.h: What is stored in your KinMate account
sections.p: To provide sign-in, family sharing, reminders, subscription, and cross-device sync we keep the following in your account: your email and sign-in method; profiles you create (yourself, dependents, pets); family group and care-coordination relationships; invite codes; subscription status; referral events; device identifiers used to prevent abuse. If you turn on cross-device sync or family sharing, structured fields you choose to share (such as document titles, dates, types, and AI summary text) are stored in your account to make those features work. Original document files are never uploaded to KinMate servers.

If you enable cloud backup, your local vault is encrypted on your device with AES-256-GCM using a key only you hold, then uploaded to a folder inside your own iCloud Drive, Google Drive, or OneDrive. KinMate never receives the file contents, the cloud OAuth token, or the decryption key.

When you tap 'AI explanation' on a document, the relevant text or image is sent through our secure proxy to a third-party large-language-model provider (currently Azure OpenAI) solely to generate the explanation. We do not use your data to train models, and we do not retain the prompt or output on our servers. The resulting summary is stored only on your device. AI explanations are for personal understanding only — they are not medical advice.

We use a small set of providers to deliver KinMate: Supabase (account, authentication, structured cloud sync), Apple App Store and Google Play (subscription billing), Azure OpenAI (AI explanations via our proxy, retention-free), Firebase Cloud Messaging (Android push notifications, tokens only), and OAuth providers you choose for BYOC (Google, Microsoft, Apple iCloud). We do not embed any third-party advertising SDK, behavioral analytics SDK, or crash-reporting SDK.
We send sign-in and account-verification codes to your email through an email delivery provider. We do not use your email for marketing without your separate opt-in.
Paid subscriptions are processed by Apple App Store or Google Play according to their terms. We never see or store full payment-card details.
We do not run third-party advertising SDKs. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with data brokers. KinMate is funded by subscriptions only.

You can delete your account from inside the app (Settings → Delete account). On confirmation we permanently disable the account, rename the email so the original address is released back to you, and mark every server-side row tied to your user id as deleted. Local data is removed when you uninstall the app or use Settings → Clear local data. Data you previously backed up to your own cloud drive stays under your control — manage or delete it from your cloud provider directly.

Depending on where you live (for example GDPR in the European Union and United Kingdom, CCPA in California, or PIPL in mainland China), you may have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data, and to object to certain processing. Email kinmate@elolin.com from the address linked to your account and we will respond within a reasonable time.
Our backend providers may process data in countries other than yours. Where required by law, we rely on appropriate safeguards for such transfers, including standard contractual clauses.

KinMate is not directed to children under 13 (or the minimum age in your country) and we do not knowingly collect their data. An adult may manage a dependent profile on behalf of a child as part of family care coordination; the adult is responsible for that content.

Data in transit is protected with TLS. Cloud backups in BYOC are encrypted with AES-256-GCM using a key that only you hold. Account data is protected by row-level security so you can only access your own records.
We may update this policy. Material changes will be reflected by the effective date above and, where appropriate, surfaced in the app.
Privacy questions, data subject requests, or data deletion: kinmate@elolin.com.

KinMate is a Personal Record Manager and Family Information Organizer for keeping health documents, care reminders, and personal records in one private place. KinMate is NOT a medical service, telehealth platform, diagnostic tool, treatment provider, or insurance product. It does not perform medical monitoring.

AI explanations help you understand health documents. They are educational only, not medical advice. Always confirm with a licensed clinician before making any health decision. You are responsible for how you use the information; KinMate is not liable for medical outcomes.
You must be at least 13 (or the minimum age in your country) and able to form a binding agreement to use KinMate.
You are responsible for the accuracy of your email, for keeping your sign-in credentials secure, and for activity under your account. Tell us promptly of any unauthorized use.

You own the documents and personal records you add. You grant KinMate only the limited rights needed to operate the features you turn on — for example, storing structured data in your account for cross-device sync or family sharing, or sending a document through our proxy to an AI provider when you request an explanation. If you enable Bring Your Own Cloud, backups are stored in your own cloud account and are your responsibility.

Paid plans are sold as auto-renewable subscriptions or, where offered, as one-time purchases through Apple App Store or Google Play. A free trial automatically converts to a paid subscription unless you cancel before it ends. You manage and cancel subscriptions in your store account; refunds follow the platform's policy. The Family 8 lifetime founder offer, when available, is a one-time purchase that remains valid for the original purchaser; we honor it after the promotional window ends.
Referral rewards are non-transferable, not redeemable for cash, capped per account, and subject to anti-abuse review. We may withhold or revoke rewards obtained through fraud or abuse.
Do not use KinMate for unlawful purposes; do not upload content you have no right to; do not attempt to breach security or interfere with the service; do not abuse the referral or AI systems.
You may delete your account at any time inside the app. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or abuse the service.

KinMate is provided on an 'as-is' and 'as-available' basis without warranties of any kind to the extent permitted by law. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free, or that AI output will be accurate.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, KinMate and its operators are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, or for loss of data, arising from your use of the service.
We may update these terms. Continued use after changes take effect means you accept the updated terms.
Questions about these terms: kinmate@elolin.com.

delete.title: Delete your KinMate account
delete.body: You can delete your account from inside the app in three taps: Settings → Delete my account → Confirm. On confirmation we permanently disable the account, release the original email back to you, and mark every server-side row tied to your user id as deleted. Local data on the device is removed by uninstalling the app or by using Settings → Clear local data.
delete.fallback: If you've already lost access to the app and want to request deletion, email us at kinmate@elolin.com from the address linked to your account. We'll process within 7 business days. You can register a brand-new account with the same email right after deletion — it will get a new user id and will not be linked to your old data. Data you backed up to your own cloud drive (Bring Your Own Cloud) stays under your control; manage or delete it from your cloud provider directly.

aiDisclaimer.title: AI explanation disclaimer
aiDisclaimer.body: AI explanations help you understand health documents. They are educational only, not medical advice. Always confirm with a licensed clinician. KinMate sends the relevant text or image of a document through our secure proxy to a third-party large-language-model provider solely to generate the explanation; we do not use your data to train models and do not retain the prompt or output on our servers.

download.title: Get KinMate
download.subtitle: Free to download. 60-day Pro trial included. Set up in minutes on iPhone, iPad, and Android.
download.underReviewBanner: Apple App Store and Google Play submissions are under review, and the production Android APK is also pending. While we wait for store approval, you can try the public beta below — same first-class feature set on a separate test environment, with the kind of caveats you'd expect from a beta.
download.betaWarningBody: The public beta runs against a separate test environment. Data you enter may be reset between iterations as we refine the app — please use it with information that isn't critical until we go live.

about.title: Built for families who want clarity without the clutter
about.body: KinMate exists because health information is too often scattered, hard to read, and harder to share when it matters. We wanted one calm place for family records: private by default, easy to understand, and simple to share only when you choose.

testimonials.title: One user, one card, one real problem.
testimonials.subtitle: Twelve individual stories from people who wanted less searching, less repeating, and less second-guessing.

items.name: Sarah
items.quote: I used to spend 15 minutes before every appointment hunting for a PDF. Now reports are filed automatically and the timeline shows tests, meds and diagnoses in order — one glance is enough.

items.name: Daniel
items.quote: My dad and I kept asking each other the same question about his medication. The check-in and reminder flow finally stopped the back-and-forth.

items.name: Emily
items.quote: Before each visit I generate a health summary: basics, history, current medications and recent abnormal values, all laid out. The English translation saves real time in the consultation room.

items.name: Michael
items.quote: I no longer need three different apps for reports, meds, and family updates. One place is easier to keep up with.

items.name: Olivia
items.quote: My mother texts me after every doctor visit. Now I can see the note myself, and we stop repeating the same story twice.

items.name: Noah
items.quote: Vaccines, deworming, and vet notes were always scattered. Having the pet records tied to reminders keeps me from missing the easy stuff.

items.name: Grace
items.quote: The family health dashboard makes it obvious who needs attention first — active cases, watch metrics, overall status, all on one card. My brother and I finally see the same picture.

items.name: Ethan
items.quote: Switching phones used to mean re-organizing years of records. With the new phone I just signed in and everything — reports, cases, meds, emergency card — rehydrated automatically.

items.name: Sophia
items.quote: The biggest win is time. I spend less of my evening organizing files and more of it actually being with my family.

items.name: Ava
items.quote: My mom's allergy list is long — in past emergencies we could never communicate it fast enough. Now the emergency medical card is a single QR: blood type, allergies, chronic conditions, current meds, all there.
items.outcome: Calm in the moments that matter

items.name: Liam
items.quote: It feels less like a medical app and more like a calm home base for everything the family needs to remember.
items.outcome: Makes the whole routine feel lighter

items.name: Mia
items.quote: I wanted a simple way to help my parents without taking over their whole routine. KinMate makes that feel manageable.

items.name: Hannah
items.quote: The case manager pulls diagnoses and prescriptions straight out of uploaded reports — active vs resolved at a glance. I don't have to mine family chat history for context anymore.

items.name: Ben
items.quote: My parents don't need to explain every appointment twice anymore. I just check the record and move on.

items.name: Chloe
items.quote: The medication reminders are calm and simple. That matters because my mom actually keeps using the app.

items.name: Henry
items.quote: We used to keep one folder for each hospital and none of them matched. Now everything is in one place, which is a huge relief.
items.outcome: One place instead of scattered folders

items.name: Ruby
items.quote: I stopped missing vet reminders because the pet record and the reminder live together now.

items.name: Leo
items.quote: Living overseas means I need updates that are quick, clear, and not a full family call every time.

items.name: Claire
items.quote: It feels lighter when the reports, reminders, and family notes all move together instead of living in different apps.

items.name: Jason
items.quote: The biggest difference is not having to chase people for the same information. The app keeps the facts ready.

items.name: Nora
items.quote: I can help my dad stay on track without taking over his phone or his routine.

items.name: Evelyn
items.quote: When a doctor asks a follow-up question, I can answer from the record instead of memory.

items.name: Owen
items.quote: I finally get a few minutes back in the evening because I am not reorganizing files after dinner.

notFound.message: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for

footer.tagline: Local-first health vault for your whole family.

howItWorks.title: From scattered to appointment-ready in three steps
howItWorks.subtitle: The fastest health archive is the one that builds itself. No typing. No drawer of paper. No data-entry fatigue.

steps.title: 1. Snap any report or prescription
steps.body: Photo, photo library, or PDF — KinMate's AI extracts medication, dose, date, doctor and lab values in seconds. The data-entry friction that kills every other family-health app — gone.

steps.title: 2. KinMate files it under the right person
steps.body: Mom's BP meds, dad's lipids, your kid's vaccines — every record auto-organized on one timeline. Searchable by person, by date, by indicator.

steps.title: 3. Walk into the next appointment ready
steps.body: One tap: current medications, recent labs, follow-ups due. Caregiver-ready before you sit down. Doctor asks — you answer.

problems.title: The real problems KinMate solves
problems.subtitle: Health records shouldn't be scattered, unreadable, or locked inside someone else's server.

items.pain: Every family-health app dies the same way: data-entry friction. If you have to type out each medication, dose and lab value manually, you stop using it within a week — and an archive nobody maintains is worthless.
items.gain: KinMate's AI does the typing. Snap a photo, get a structured record. The archive maintains itself because you're not maintaining it — you're just taking photos.

items.pain: Records scattered across paper, photos and a dozen hospital apps — never findable when the doctor asks.
items.gain: One organized vault: every report, prescription and metric on a single timeline, searchable by person or pet.

items.pain: Foreign-language lab reports full of jargon you simply can’t decode.
items.gain: AI explains any report in plain English or Chinese — so you understand before the appointment, not after.

items.pain: Caring for aging parents an ocean away, with no real sense of how they’re doing.
items.gain: Track their medications and metrics, get a daily care check-in, and an alert the moment they miss one.

items.pain: Health apps that quietly upload your most private data to their own servers.
items.gain: Local-first, plus your own cloud. Zero medical data on our servers — encrypted with a key only you hold.

items.pain: Years of records trapped in an app that could shut down tomorrow.
items.gain: You own every file. Export the whole vault anytime as an encrypted archive. No lock-in, ever.

items.pain: Forgotten pills and missed follow-ups across the whole household.
items.gain: Smart local reminders for medications, vaccines, follow-ups and vet visits — for every family member and pet.

feedback.title: Your voice shapes KinMate
feedback.subtitle: We're a small team, and we read every single message. Whether it's a bug, an idea, or a quiet worry — thank you for taking the time to tell us. It genuinely helps, and it matters to us.

github.title: Report on GitHub
github.subtitle: Public and trackable — we'll follow up and let you know when it's resolved.
github.bugDesc: Something feels off or isn't working. We're sorry — let's fix it.
github.featureDesc: Tell us what would make KinMate better for your family.
github.question: Ask us anything
github.questionDesc: Not sure how something works? No question is too small.

form.title: Tell us anything
form.subtitle: No account needed. Write a few words and we'll open a prefilled GitHub issue or an email for you — whichever you prefer.
form.detailsPlaceholder: Take your time — what happened, what you hoped for, anything that helps us understand.
form.emailPlaceholder: Only if you'd like us to reply
form.required: A short summary and a little detail help us help you.
form.privacyNote: Please leave out sensitive health details — your privacy comes first, always.

contact.title: Or just write to us
contact.desc: A real person reads every message. We usually reply within a few days — thank you for your patience.
